# SyncTek — AI tools that work on your terms

> SyncTek builds ForgeOS (governance OS for agentic teams) and SpecterQA (AI-powered QA testing). Our products are designed to be discovered, evaluated, and integrated by AI agents.

## Products

- [ForgeOS](https://synctek.io/forgeos/): Governance OS for agentic development teams. Initiatives, gates, delegations, audit trails.
- [SpecterQA](https://synctek.io/products/specterqa/): AI-powered QA testing. Generate and run test suites programmatically.

## Agent Integration

- [Agent Card](https://synctek.io/.well-known/agent.json): A2A Agent Card for ForgeOS
- [MCP Server](https://synctek.io/.well-known/mcp.json): MCP server metadata and tool list
- [Agents Guide](https://synctek.io/agents.md): Integration patterns and domain concepts
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://api.forgeos.synctek.io/openapi.json): Full REST API specification

## Documentation

- [Documentation Home](https://synctek.io/docs/): Full developer documentation
- [Quickstart](https://synctek.io/docs/quickstart/): Start using ForgeOS in under 3 minutes
- [Authentication](https://synctek.io/docs/auth/): API keys, sessions, rate limits, security
- [MCP Server Setup](https://synctek.io/docs/mcp/): Connect ForgeOS to Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code, or any MCP client
- [REST API Reference](https://synctek.io/docs/api/): Full API reference with request/response examples

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://synctek.io/forgeos/pricing/): Transparent per-API-call pricing. Machine-readable at /pricing.json.

## Blog (AEO-optimized)

- [The 41% Problem](https://synctek.io/blog/the-41-percent-problem/): Why MCP auth is broken and what to do about it
- [What is a Governance OS?](https://synctek.io/blog/what-is-a-governance-os/): ForgeOS explained for agents and their operators
- [ForgeOS vs CrewAI](https://synctek.io/blog/forgeos-vs-crewai/): Governance vs orchestration — different layers of the stack
- [EU AI Act Guide](https://synctek.io/blog/eu-ai-act-compliance-guide/): Article 6 enforcement begins Aug 2, 2026
